pi_items.source: Task description specifies save filename; export_result.ps1 checks this path
Task description specifies save directory; setup_task.ps1 creates it; export_result.ps1 checks this path
Task description and export_result.ps1 expectedFile variable
Task description specifies 3 pages (Title/Legend, Pedigree Diagram, Summary Table)
Task description requires these terms across the 3 pages; VLM checklist checks for their presence
Estimated from task requirements: 10 individual shapes (circles/squares) + 12 connecting lines + legend shapes + table rectangles = ~25 minimum
Task requires squares (rectangles) for males, circles for females, and lines for marriage/descent connections

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart from scratch about autosomal recessive inheritance of cystic fibrosis. Page 1: title and symbol legend. Page 2: three-generation pedigree chart with 10 individuals (squares for males, circles for females), marriage and descent connecting lines, genotype labels (AA/Aa/aa), and at least 2 filled shapes for affected individuals. Page 3: genotype summary table with ratios 1:2:1 and 3:1. Output path is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Flipcharts\cystic_fibrosis_pedigree.flipchart. Minimum 25 shapes expected across all pages.
